summary: Stripe integration for custom-matches leagues tested successfully. All backend APIs working. Frontend UI features verified after fixing route issue. Fixed missing payment-success route in _layout.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe integration fully functional. Backend APIs tested: POST /api/payments/custom-league-checkout (creates Stripe checkout session, returns URL starting with https://checkout.stripe.com/), GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} (returns payment_status, status, amount=89.99, currency=eur, type=custom_league_creation), POST /api/leagues (national source - free). Frontend tested: /league/create shows correct conditional UI when switching between national and custom source types. Payment-success route was fixed in _layout.tsx

backend.custom_league_checkout: PASSED - Creates Stripe checkout session, returns URL and session_id
backend.payment_status: PASSED - Returns payment_status, status, amount, currency, type
backend.auth_required: PASSED - All payment endpoints require authentication

frontend.create_league_national: PASSED - Default selection shows 'CREA LEGA' button in blue
frontend.price_badge: PASSED - '89,99 EUR' badge visible on Personalizzate card
frontend.yellow_info_note: PASSED - Appears when custom selected explaining 89.99 EUR pricing
frontend.custom_button: PASSED - Button changes to amber color with 'PAGA E CREA LEGA - 89,99 EUR' and card icon
frontend.payment_success_page: PASSED - Shows polling screen with 'Verifica pagamento in corso...' text

fixes_applied.payment_success_route: Added <Stack.Screen name='payment-success' /> to /app/frontend/app/league/_layout.tsx - this route was missing causing 'Unmatched Route' error
